== Notes for [[Item:Q107131|Q107131]] ==

Basrah.
--------------------
38. MUHAMMAD.ANAGIB-8. The one who leave for Basra, Iraq.
was born in Madinah (Yang Berangkat Ke Basrah)
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d8.htm#i18
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0018.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001490131714

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
